seoDescription: Learn how Palm & Light Coffee collects, uses, and protects your information.
title: Palm & Light Coffee — Privacy Policy
intro: Palm & Light Coffee ("we", "our", or "us") respects your privacy and is committed to protecting your information.

sections.title: Information We Collect
sections.body1: We may collect the following information:
items: Event or inquiry details (for catering or contact forms)
Any information you voluntarily submit through forms on our website
sections.body2: We do not knowingly collect sensitive personal data unless explicitly provided by you.

sections.title: How We Use Information
items: Improve our website and user experience
sections.body2: We do not sell or rent your personal information.

sections.title: Third-Party Services
sections.body1: We may use third-party services such as:
sections.body2: These providers may process your data in accordance with their own privacy policies.

sections.title: Cookies
sections.body1: Our website may use cookies or similar technologies to improve functionality and user experience.
sections.body2: You can control cookie behavior through your browser settings.

sections.title: Data Security
sections.body1: We take reasonable steps to protect your information.
sections.body2: However, no method of transmission over the internet is completely secure.

sections.title: Your Rights
sections.body2: Contact us at privacy@palmandlight.co for privacy requests.

sections.title: Changes
sections.body1: We may update this policy from time to time.
sections.body2: Updates will be posted on this page.
